message:
feat(policy): integrate NamespaceRegistry into PolicyEngine for multi-tenant isolation

Wire NamespaceRegistry into PolicyEngine's evaluate_authorization() flow so
that cross-tenant access is explicitly checked when an actor_namespace is
present on PolicyInput. Denials are recorded to AuditChain and ComplianceEngine.

- Add NamespaceIsolationConfig (enabled, cross_tenant_policy, max_audit_entries)
  with permissive/strict/disabled presets and NamespaceRegistry::from_config()
- Add actor_namespace field to PolicyInput with with_namespace() builder
- Add namespace_isolation field to SafetyConfig
- 8 new integration tests covering same-ns allow, cross-ns deny (strict),
  cross-ns allow (permissive), disabled bypass, connector actions, and
  audit chain + compliance recording on denial

PolicyEngine now has 16 integrated subsystems.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
